text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking with Inari One to the track to
begin our training session...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, someone's already here? Hm, who's that with
Tickezo?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is engaged in conversation with
two students about something.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniff! I understand how you feel. That's why... I'm going to let you use the time I reserved on the track!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I-I'd just be in the way. So, I-I'm going to go back
now. Waaaaaugh!
choice_data_list: Looks like trouble! Let's hurry and stop her—
Looks like trouble! Let's hurry and stop her—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Hold it right theeere!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, pump your brakes! The heck ya think
you're doin'?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tryin' to snatch someone's reserved track time!
You've got some real guts!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wha? Inari? What do you mean "snatch"?

text_block_list.name: Blonde-Haired Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo! Inari's right! We couldn't let you give up
your track time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you were talkin' about doin' your
best to get ready for your debut, and Tickezo
overheard?
choice_data_list:
She was inspired, so she offered to give up her
time on the track.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's right! While I was warming up, I overheard
their conversation!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You talked about doing your best in the tryouts
so you could one day compete as rivals in a G1!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Seeing the sparkle in your eyes made me want to help out! Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
A-actually! I'm really happy you offered to help. I
want all the time I can afford to train for my
debut, but...

text_block_list.name: Blonde-Haired Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
It wouldn't be right to achieve our dream by
trampling over someone else's. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Now that...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: is CLASSY!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya think, Boss? How 'bout lettin' 'em use
my training slot?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya think, Boss? How 'bout lettin' 'em use
my training slot?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Seein' these girls bond over chasin' their dreams,
and witnessin' Tickezo's bighearted kindness...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It wouldn't sit right if I didn't lend a hand!
choice_data_list: Cool! Let's go for a run outside the academy!

text_block_list.name: Blonde-Haired Younger Student
text_block_list.text:
W-we couldn't possibly impose on you! What
about the track time you booked for your
training?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What're ya talkin' 'bout? Who said I'm doin' this
for you?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm doin' this for myself!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Repayin' class in style—that's just how we roll in
Edo, ya know!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So don't sweat it! Just stand tall and run like the
wind!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
How about taggin' along, Tickezo? Me and you
could do a few laps outside the grounds!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
OHHH! That'd be great! I'd love to do some
partner running with you!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: Thank you so, so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Inari One and Winning Ticket run up
and down the riverside until they're completely
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Maaan, this feels waaay better than runnin' on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It does! It feels really refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Runnin' with a classy partner makes it all
the better!
choice_data_list: It's nice to train differently once in a while!
It's nice to train differently once in a while!
It makes me want to run too.
It makes me want to run too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Runnin' with a classy partner makes it all
the better!
choice_data_list: It's nice to train differently once in a while!
It's nice to train differently once in a while!
It makes me want to run too.
It makes me want to run too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You bet! Plus, me and Tickezo are on the same
wavelength, ya know!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I feel the same! Um, hey! Do you want to
go for another run?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm game! C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of them continue running happily
beneath the glow of the setting sun.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you said it! Ya heard that, didn'tcha,
Tickezo?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I sure did! Okay, Trainer! On your mark, get set...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Run with everythin' ya got, and make sure ya finish with style!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I work up a good sweat chasing after the two as
they run off along the riverside, beneath the
glowing sunset.
